questionHtml: Using the spacetime diagram, determine which event occurred first for the spacecraft observer, event 1 or event 2.
markschemeHtml:
line from event 2 parallel to x ’ axis intersects ct’ axis at a negative value ✔

event 2 occurred first ✔
